lore.shortDescription: You hurl a bubble of acid that harms one or two nearby creatures.
lore.fullText: You hurl a bubble of acid. Choose one creature you can see within range, or choose two creatures you can see within range that are within 5 feet of each other. A target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 acid damage. This spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you reach 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

lore.shortDescription: A cinder mote lashes a nearby target.
lore.fullText: You snap your fingers and launch a cinder mote at one creature you can see within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 fire damage. The spell's damage increases by 1d8 at 5th level, 11th level, and 17th level.

lore.shortDescription: A protective ring of cinders blunts incoming harm.
lore.fullText: A ring of smoldering cinders surrounds you in a 10-foot radius aura. You and creatures of your choice in the aura have resistance to cold damage. A hostile creature that enters the aura for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there takes 2d8 fire damage.
lore.higherLevel: When you cast this spell using a slot of 5th level or higher, the fire damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

lore.shortDescription: A cursed bolt scorches and unbalances a foe.
lore.fullText: You hurl a streak of black-red fire at one creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 fire damage and has disadvantage on the next saving throw it makes before the end of your next turn.
lore.higherLevel: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

lore.shortDescription: You blink through moonlight to a safer position.
lore.fullText: You teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. Until the start of your next turn, your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks.

lore.shortDescription: A falling sigil detonates in radiant fire.
lore.fullText: You mark a point you can see within range and call down a stellar sigil. Creatures in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 6d8 radiant damage and 6d8 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
lore.higherLevel: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, both damage rolls increase by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.

lore.shortDescription: Shadow tendrils bind and drain a creature.
lore.fullText: Choose one creature you can see within range. The target must make a Strength saving throw. On a failure, it is restrained by tendrils of void-energy. While restrained this way, it takes 2d6 necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.
